name: Bug Fixes (unofficial patch set)
author: neostryder (RPGM Tools)
description: Bundled, opt-in fixes for upstream Angband 4.2.6 crash / data-corruption / save-load / determinism / logic-error bugs, in the model of an unofficial patch. Every fix is gated by a named core rule flag and OFF in core; removing this mod returns the game to faithful, buggy-as-shipped 4.2.6 behaviour. See docs/modding/BUG_FIXES.md.
